other_observers: Andrew Spencer; Mark Peterson saw some HETAs in the same area that we saw the bird. Mark saw the birds with a field trip that he lead into this ranch.
specific_location: Bader Ranch, between La Junta and Kim
description: It was yellow on the forehead, breast, belly, and tail. The head, auriculars, back, and flanks were gray. The throat and head is the brightest yellow. It also has a dark bill.Behaviors: A pair was flying back and forth to the nest and they were feeding the nestlings.Call: I can't remember if I heard one or not.Plumage: Adult
